condition.description: Defines an IAM condition that specifies the attributes under which the IAM binding is applied, such as expression, title, and description. Required for conditional role bindings.

crypto_key_id.description: ID of the KMS CryptoKey to which the IAM member will be bound; must be in the format `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{cryptoKey}`

member.description: Specifies the IAM identity to be granted the role, such as a user, service account, or group.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member, such as roles/cloudkms.cryptoKeyEncrypterDecrypter.
